description: Object detailing allowances and deductions used in the retrieved tax calculation.

personalAllowance.description: The personal allowance available for the tax year. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999. No decimals.

marriageAllowanceTransferOut.description: Object containing details about marriage allowance transferred out.

personalAllowanceBeforeTransferOut.description: The amount of the personal allowance before transferring out. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

transferredOutAmount.description: The amount of the personal allowance that has been transferred out. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

reducedPersonalAllowance.description: The amount that the personal allowance has been reduced to. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999. No decimals.

giftOfInvestmentsAndPropertyToCharity.description: Investments or property gifts made to charity. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999. No decimals.

blindPersonsAllowance.description: Blind Person's Allowance. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999. No decimals.

lossesAppliedToGeneralIncome.description: Losses that have been applied to general income. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999. No decimals.

cgtLossSetAgainstInYearGeneralIncome.description: CGT losses that have been applied to general income. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999. No decimals.

qualifyingLoanInterestFromInvestments.description: Qualifying loan interest payments made. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

postCessationTradeReceipts.description: Trade reliefs and other losses post cessation of a business. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

paymentsToTradeUnionsForDeathBenefits.description: Payments made to a trade union or friendly society for death benefits. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

grossAnnuityPayments.description: The gross value of annuity payments made. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

annuityPayments.description: Object containing details about annuity payments.

reliefClaimed.description: The value of annual payments made. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

rate.description: The tax rate used in the calculation. This value must be between 0 and 99.99 up to 2 decimal places.

pensionContributions.description: Total of 'Retirement Annuity Payments', 'Payment To Employers Scheme No Tax Relief' and 'Overseas Pension Scheme Contributions'. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

pensionContributionsDetail.description: Object containing details of any pension contributions made.

retirementAnnuityPayments.description: The value of retirement annuity payments. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

paymentToEmployersSchemeNoTaxRelief.description: Payments to employer's pension scheme with no tax relief. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

overseasPensionSchemeContributions.description: The value of contributions to an overseas pension scheme. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

totalPartnershipLossesBroughtForward.description: {{#unless (releasedInProduction '1885_r20_losses_claims_partner_income_docs')}}[Test only] {{/unless}}The total amount of partnership losses brought forward from earlier tax years. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.
